title: How (and why) to take a logarithm of an image
summary: 3Blue1Brown explores the mathematical technique of taking the logarithm of an image through the lens of MC Escher's Print Gallery. The video demonstrates how conformal maps and complex analysis can be used to unwrap and analyze recursive spatial structures in art.
